title: arenaria glandulosa
intro: Arenaria glandulosa, also known as Sticky Mouse-ear or Sticky Chickweed, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is a low-growing, perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Arenaria glandulosa can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to treat skin conditions and wounds.
